sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79863" key="pa/rfaine" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρφαινε</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρφάμενος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρφάσθαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρφᾰσία</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρφᾰσις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρφέρομαι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρφῠγέειν</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παραφ-</foreign>.</entryFree>
